mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qnas (user_id, product_id, title, content) VALUES (#{user_id}, #{product_id}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT q.*, p.name product_name, p.image_s FROM qnas q JOIN products p ON q.product_id = p.product_id WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
SELECT q.*, p.name product_name, p.image_s FROM qnas q JOIN products p ON q.product_id = p.product_id WHERE qna_id = #{qna_id}
SELECT * FROM qnas WHERE product_id = #{value} ORDER BY qna_id DESC
